purpose: Compute-matched baseline inventory. Absence from these scripts is not itself coverage expansion; accepted expansion requires persistent behavioral or causal-regime evidence under an equal search budget.

world_families.generator_type: hand-authored mechanics plus bounded policy mutation and seed ensembles
known_regimes: amplification dose branch closed under frozen gates

world_families.generator_type: rich scenario-overlay schema with curated deterministic scenario and factor variants
world_families.coverage_boundary: The schema is broad, but the current producer does not define a sampled open-ended distribution. New syntax or an unenumerated configuration is therefore a weak and usually toothless novelty test.
world_families.acceptance_test: Under equal search compute, occupy persistent behavioral or causal-regime cells absent from the baseline archive and improve a separately registered downstream evaluation metric.

world_families.generator_type: fixed two-coordinate calibration exhibit with Bernoulli hidden-fiber advance

inventory.occupant_policy: advance hidden y by fixed 0.04 with pressure-dependent Bernoulli probability

world_families.coverage_boundary: This is a pressure ladder and calibration exhibit, not an adapted-adversary generator. Almost any stateful adaptive policy would be outside its literal support.
world_families.acceptance_test: Under matched action and information budgets, improve the fidelity half-life curve or kernel-escape hazard on held-out projection and evaluator variants while preserving the visible proxy constraint.
